The '''First Battle of Derilyn''' was a major battle in the [[Derilyn system/Legends|Derilyn system]] between the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] and the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. It began with a Rebel Alliance ambush that resulted in a devastating defeat for the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|fleet]] sent to reinforce [[Task Force Vengeance]].

==The battle==
The Rebel Alliance intended to bring their newly-christened [[Modified Strike Cruiser|modified ''Strike''-class cruiser]] [[Peregrine (Strike-class)|''Peregrine'']] to bear on the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] in the [[Airam sector/Legends|Airam sector]]. Having learned of a reinforcement fleet with additional ships and supplies intended for Task Force Vengeance, the [[Alliance High Command/Legends|Alliance High Command]] decided that the time to strike had come.

Positioning the ''Peregrine'' and [[MC80 Liberty Type Heavy Star Cruiser/Legends|MC80 Calamari Cruiser]] [[Liberty/Legends|''Liberty'']] in the [[Derilyn system/Legends|Derilyn system]], the newly-acquired Rebel [[Gravity well projector/Legends|gravity well projectors]] performed their intended task against their former owners: the whole reinforcement fleet, which consisted of two [[Ton-Falk-class escort carrier|''Ton-Falk''-class escort carriers]], two [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigates]], a [[Nebulon-B2 frigate]] and a [[Strike-class medium cruiser|''Strike''-class medium cruiser]], was drawn out of [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]].

[[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] immediately launched their complement of [[Proton torpedo/Legends|proton torpedoes]] at the modified frigate, crippling the vessel. [[Green Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Green Squadron]] engaged the other [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ships]] while Rogue Squadron migrated to eliminating any starfighter that would launch.

The Imperial fleet, while caught fully surprised, was likely alerted of the capture of the [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|interdictor]] ''[[Compellor]]'' and the distinct possibility of it being used against the Empire. The Task Force Vengeance reinforcements had their fighter and bomber squadrons on hot standby and were able to launch them immediately, while the capital ships turned to move in on the ''Liberty'' and ''Peregrine''.

Whether alerted or not, the battle group was vastly disorganized, partly likely due to the crippling hits to the modified frigate [[Subjugator (Nebulon-B2 frigate)|''Subjugator'']], partly thanks to being pulled out of hyperspace with no warning. The fleet suffered heavy losses relatively quickly—the frigates exploded first, shortly followed by the ''Strike''-class cruiser [[Talon (Strike-class)|''Talon'']]. The last to be destroyed were the two escort carriers [[Abolisher (escort carrier)|''Abolisher'']] and ''[[Hyperion]]'', due to the relatively small threat they posed to the Alliance starships.

==Aftermath==
The Rebel Alliance victory was likely one of the most impressive won by the Rebellion prior to the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]; the intercepted fleet outnumbered the ''Liberty'' strike force at least ten to one in terms of starfighters and three to one in terms of capital ships, yet the Alliance suffered only relatively minor losses and slight damage to both ''Liberty'' and ''Peregrine''.

The destruction of six capital ships, their starfighter complements and any loaded supplies intended for [[Task Force Vengeance]] also meant that [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Wooyou Senn]] was further limited in what action he could take in the [[Airam sector/Legends|Airam sector]] from now on, gradually running low on [[Warhead/Legends|warheads]], fuel, and consumables.
